items.title: How a hash map turns a key into a slot
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR K["key 'gpt-4o'"] --> H["hash('gpt-4o')"] H --> M["mod table_size"] M --> S["slot index"] S --> T["buckets[idx]
('gpt-4o', 0.005)"] T --> V["value 0.005"]
items.caption: The key is hashed and mapped to a slot, so reads/writes are O(1) on average instead of scanning the whole table.
